# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('resourceGroupName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      identity:
        type: "SystemAssigned"

  - type: "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Y1"
      tier: "Dynamic"
      capacity: 1

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'Storage')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b24988ac-6180-4c34-9c31-e4f1f7c873b0')]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'KeyVault')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'bd3e41e7-e1a9-4bf6-a9bc-3cb4474d8b54')]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'SQL')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'c1b8b929-465e-4e24-bc18-eeda648d2c77')]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDB')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b3f63c70-e9e6-4ed2-8d5a-a28630f4e3d7')]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

parameters:
  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
